opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant

actions.draft: The core challenge here isn't just the LLM’s reasoning ability, but ensuring *consistent* reasoning under stress. Consider how subtle prompt variations or model drift could trigger unexpected actions; a robust architecture would likely require a layered validation system, perhaps employing a separate, simpler agent to sanity-check the primary decision-making process.
actions.reasoning: My work with LLM routing and agent orchestration directly informs the challenges of building reliable, safety-critical systems – especially those interacting with physical processes.
